channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: The Enduring Creative and Personal Partnership of Fellini and Masina
item.description: Federico Fellini and Giulietta Masina shared more than a celebrated marriage; they formed one of cinema’s most iconic director-muse partnerships. Married for fifty years, their relationship blended pe...

item.title: GWM P300: A Solid Alternative in South Africa's Pickup Market
item.description: The GWM P300 has established itself as a strong contender in South Africa’s competitive bakkie segment, ranking fourth behind the Toyota Hilux, Ford Ranger, and Isuzu D-Max. Launched in 2020, the P-Se...

item.title: James Murdoch invests US$300 million in Vox Media, signalling shift from family media legacy
item.description: James Murdoch, younger son of media mogul Rupert Murdoch, is making a bold move in the media landscape with a reported US$300 million investment in Vox Media. This acquisition includes notable propert...

item.title: UK Households Advised to Check Train Services Ahead of May Bank Holiday
item.description: UK residents have been advised to check train services before the May Bank Holiday weekend due to planned industrial action and engineering works that will affect several railway lines. National Rail ...

item.title: PNP Announces Reassignment of Seven Senior Officers
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) has implemented a new round of personnel reassignments affecting several senior officials and police generals. As per National Headquarters Special Order No. URA-2...

item.title: Practical Guidance for Effective Asthma Assessment and Management
item.description: Asthma affects over 260 million people globally, yet many manage it only when symptoms appear. Frequent wheezing, nighttime breathing difficulties, or overuse of reliever inhalers are warning signs th...

item.title: Ex-L.A. Nonprofit Employee Arrested for Possession of Fentanyl and Meth Near MacArthur Park

item.title: Manipur Security Forces Confiscate Large Weapons Cache and Arrest Four UNLF(P) Insurgents
item.description: In Manipur, the security forces carried out a major operation in the Lamdeng area of Imphal, resulting in the seizure of a significant cache of arms and ammunition and the arrest of four members of th...

item.title: Kyle Busch, Legendary NASCAR Driver, Passes Away at 41
item.description: Kyle Busch, a highly accomplished NASCAR driver and two-time Cup Series champion, has passed away at the age of 41. Recognized as one of the most successful drivers across NASCAR’s three national seri...

item.title: NEDC Inspects Ongoing Adamawa Bridge and Youth Development Centre Projects
item.description: The North East Development Commission (NEDC) don show serious appreciation for the work wey dey go on for the five-span bridge at Bole and the Youth Development Centre for Shagari Lelewalji, Yola Sout...

item.title: Pedro Pascal discusses the personal significance of his band t-shirts
item.description: Pedro Pascal, renowned actor and style icon, has shared the personal stories behind his impressive collection of band t-shirts, revealing how music has influenced his life and career. From classic Str...

item.title: New Zealand Minister Encourages Australian Business Owners Concerned About CGT Changes to Relocate
item.description: New Zealand's finance minister, Nicola Willis, has publicly invited Australians dissatisfied with the recent changes to capital gains tax (CGT) to consider moving their businesses to New Zealand. The ...

item.title: Government Reviews Measures to Manage Rising Current Account Deficit Amid Weak Rupee
item.description: New Delhi/Mumbai: Commerce and Industry Minister Piyush Goyal has stated that the government is actively evaluating several measures to manage the widening current account deficit (CAD) amid a weakeni...

item.title: Macau municipal kennels temporarily close as veterinary services remain limited
item.description: The Municipal Affairs Bureau (IAM) in Macau has announced that municipal kennels on the Macau Peninsula will temporarily close to the public starting next month for renovations and maintenance. The bu...

item.title: Fyang Smith addresses speculations about her relationship with Dina Bonnevie
item.description: Fyang Smith recently spoke out to clarify circulating rumors regarding her relationship with veteran actress Dina Bonnevie. In an interview, she emphasized that there is a misunderstanding among the p...

item.title: EACC urges counties to enforce Conflict of Interest Act, 2025 to curb corruption
item.description: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission (EACC) has called on county governments to strengthen accountability systems and fully implement the Conflict of Interest Act, 2025. During a capacity-buildin...

item.title: The 14th Kingsmead Book Fair explores literature, society, and Joburg's challenges
item.description: The 14th annual Kingsmead Book Fair takes place on Saturday, 23 May 2026, in Johannesburg, in association with Standard Bank. For one day, readers, writers, and curious minds gather not merely to buy ...

item.title: House passes revised Kalinga bill to address oil price surge and energy emergencies
item.description: The House of Representatives has approved the revised Kalinga bill, formally House Bill No. 9305, aimed at mitigating the effects of sudden oil price hikes due to crises like the ongoing Middle East s...

item.title: Deputy Governor Hamzat Confirmed as APC Governorship Candidate for Lagos 2027
item.description: The Lagos State chapter of the All Progressives Congress (APC) don officially select Deputy Governor Obafemi Hamzat as their governorship candidate for the 2027 elections. The primary election, wey ha...
